name: Aon HR Agent
description: HR agent. Handles employee benefits and wellness operations.

skills.name: HR Portal & Org Chart Access
skills.description: Retrieves employee profile, security context, and renders the organization hierarchy graph.
examples: let's look at my HR portal

skills.name: Performance Review Synthesis
skills.description: Synthesizes performance data, calculates competency scores, and generates a radar chart.
examples: help me prepare for my performance review

skills.name: Benefits & Vacation Summary
skills.description: Retrieves active enrollments and tracks vacation days usage.
examples: how many vacation days do I have left?

skills.name: Benefit Registration Action
skills.description: Enrolls employees in benefits and logs audit trails to cloud systems.
examples: Enroll me in the Commuter Benefit
